title: cylindrolobus arunachalensis
intro: Cylindrolobus arunachalensis is a type of plant species belonging to the family Icacinaceae. It is native to the Eastern Himalayas and Arunachal Pradesh in India and is known for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. Cylindrolobus arunachalensis is used in herbal preparations such as teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are believed to provide health benefits like reduced inflammation, improved respiratory function, and enhanced immune system.
